issues.title: Missing Sub-Module Context (Files 09-27)
issues.why: The provided context truncates after file 09. While AC-21 attempts to 'pin' these as present, a mediocre coder cannot implement the logic for the updater binary (19), config schema (21), or parallel check (24) without the actual file content.
issues.fix: Provide the full content of files 10 through 28 and the subfolder 24-update-check-mechanism.

issues.title: Ambiguous 'updater.exe' Lifecycle
issues.why: AC-07 and 05-handoff describe a detached updater process but do not explicitly define if this is a separate codebase or the same binary invoked with a hidden flag, leading to potential 'missing file' errors during implementation.
issues.fix: Explicitly state in 05-handoff that the updater is the same binary invoked with a hidden 'update-runner' subcommand.

issues.title: Undefined 'latest.json' Schema in Overview
issues.why: 01-self-update-overview mentions a 'latest.json' schema but the actual JSON structure is not defined in the visible files (it likely resides in the truncated file 28).
issues.fix: Include the JSON schema for latest.json directly in 01-self-update-overview.md.
